title: carex iranica
intro: Carex iranica, also known as Iranian sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae and is native to the Middle East region. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex iranica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal usage.
